## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX teams to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and onboard new team member Jackson Wells.](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX delivered 4 articles last week; 5 were delayed due to prioritizing SEO audit and internal linking issues](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Overall traffic performance remains strong post-migration, near all-time highs](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Jackson Wells joined as Integrated Marketing Campaigns Manager, bringing SEO expertise](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Key enhancement opportunities: more SME feedback on content, leveraging internal knowledge, and improving content refresh processes](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions

  - [Vivek (GrowthX): Managing editor, runs day-to-day account operations](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [Mara (GrowthX): Associate Director, oversees implementation of larger initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Jackson (Galileo): New Integrated Marketing Campaigns Manager, background in B2B SaaS SEO](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Conor (Galileo): Existing point of contact for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

### Content Delivery & SEO Audit

  - [4 articles delivered last week](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [5 articles delayed due to prioritizing SEO audit](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Internal linking audit revealed UX issues, missing inline images, and inconsistent content transfer](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [SEO audit identified missing H1s and unusual robots.txt settings](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [Jackson assigned to follow up on SEO audit findings with dev team](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Traffic near all-time highs despite recent migration](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [70%+ engagement rates, with Google/Bing reaching 80%+](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [LLM traffic dipped slightly but not alarmingly](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Domain authority stable at \~30-31](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [GSC data showing inconsistencies, team relying more on GA4 data](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)

### Content Strategy & Process

  - [Keyword strategy less emphasized due to Galileo being ahead of search trends](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [Focus on JTBD, pain points, and internal Galileo insights for content ideation](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [Airtable used for content pipeline management](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Need for more detailed SME feedback on content drafts](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
  - [Opportunity to leverage internal Galileo knowledge (podcasts, discussions) for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)

### Content Refresh & Improvements

  - [Older content (Oct-Dec) needs updating for tone and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=2315.0)
  - [Balancing new content creation with refreshing existing articles](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=2340.0)
  - [Jackson to help source industry-relevant material for content enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jackson to review SEO audit findings with dev team](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Explore setting up bi-weekly cadence for SME content reviews](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Jackson to compile list of internal knowledge sources for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Add column to "new topics" tab in Airtable for related research/profiles](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=2557.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue internal linking audit and UX fixes](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [Team to monitor LLM referral traffic for potential ranking changes](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Explore deeper conversion tracking setup with Sawyer at Roadway](https://fathom.video/share/Pj3LbAuV7euu8sQuoY1ZxbMcsFjayTGp?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
